source_pr.title: plan: no need to pass the ctx to logicalOptRule
source_pr.body:
Assign value may cause data race.
PTAL @hanfei1991 @zz-jason @lamxTyler

symptoms: plan: fix data race in maxMinEliminater.
failure_signature: plan: fix data race in maxMinEliminater.
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to a data race in optimizer rules: logical optimization rule instances stored `ctx` in a struct field and mutated it during Optimize(), so concurrent optimizations could race on that shared field (as hinted by the PR description: "Assign value may cause data race"). This PR makes the rule stateless by removing the field and passing ctx through function arguments, eliminating the race.
fix_pattern: Make optimizer rule instances stateless (no per-call ctx stored on shared structs); pass context via parameters to avoid data races.

evidence: evidence: plan: fix data race in maxMinEliminater.

files: plan/max_min_eliminate.go, plan/aggregation_push_down.go, plan/build_key_info.go, plan/column_pruning.go, plan/decorrelate.go, plan/eliminate_projection.go, plan/expression_rewriter.go, plan/logical_plan_builder.go, plan/logical_plan_test.go, plan/optimizer.go, plan/planbuilder.go, plan/predicate_push_down.go, plan/topn_push_down.go
